caption: The video footage, captured in black and white, shows a ship on the water from an aerial perspective. The ship is positioned vertically in the frame, with a bright light emanating from its side. In the upper left of each frame, there is a logo and the text "ГОЛОВНЕ УПРАВЛІННЯ РОЗВІДКИ". In the upper right, there is a red and white "13" logo. A circular logo containing an eagle and the word "GROUP" is visible on the right side of the frames. As the sequence progresses, a bright, white flash of light erupts on the deck of the ship, obscuring much of the vessel. By the final frame, the flash expands into a large plume of white smoke and light that fills the lower half of the screen, partially concealing the ship.
